title: Effect of Exercises on Pain and Discomfort During Periods in adult female students
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"foj5f","text":"This protocol describes a randomized controlled trial to evaluate the effectiveness of core stabilization and breathing exercises in reducing pain and menstrual distress among female university students with primary dysmenorrhea. 50 participants aged 18–25 years will be randomly assigned to either an exercise intervention group or a control group receiving traditional management over a 4-week period.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"c1lid","text":"The expected results are a significant reduction in pain intensity and menstrual distress in the intervention group, along with improvements in quality of life and sleep quality compared to controls. These findings aim to support physiotherapy-based interventions as safe and effective strategies for managing primary dysmenorrhea.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"1oknr","text":"Orientation and one familiarization session will be provided before intervention to ensure correct technique.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"n1in","text":"Participants should wear comfortable clothing, avoid heavy meals 1 hr prior, and maintain a menstrual diary.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3p24n","text":"Written informed consent is mandatory before enrollment.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"o6s4","text":"Initial sessions supervised by a physiotherapist; participants must stop immediately if severe pain, dizziness, heavy bleeding, or abnormal discomfort occurs.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"efreh","text":"First aid and emergency support will be available on-site.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"47omp","text":"Adherence will be monitored weekly with exercise logs; any adverse events will be documented and reported to the IRB.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"e23eo","text":"Study approved by IRB, Jashore University of Science and Technology (PTR-JUST/IRB/2025/04/015), following the Declaration of Helsinki.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4p79l","text":"Participation is voluntary; withdrawal is allowed anytime without penalty.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"11a0p","text":"Confidentiality of participant data ensured; no financial burden on participants.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"3lggh","text":"Participants must immediately stop the intervention if they experience severe abdominal pain, dizziness, shortness of breath, heavy menstrual bleeding, or unusual discomfort.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"e5j3","text":"Only perform exercises under the initial supervision of a qualified physiotherapist to prevent incorrect technique or injury.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":83,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"604ap","text":"Do not continue intervention if any adverse events occur until cleared by the study supervisor/medical team.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2r3t6","text":"Participants should avoid taking pain-relieving medications during the study unless absolutely necessary and must report any use to the research team.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"anbej","text":"High-risk individuals (secondary dysmenorrhea, pelvic surgery, hormonal therapy, high physical activity) are excluded to reduce potential harm.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

(VAS)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3le0f","text":"Menstrual Distress Questionnaire creator: Ms. Jarin Tasnim
